sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُسْرَةُ تَجْتَمِعُ حَوْلَ النَّارِ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se skupljala oko vatre noću.
sentences.translationEn: The family used to gather around the fire at night.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَدُّ يَحْكِي قِصَصًا قَدِيمَةً لِلأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Djed je pričao stare priče djeci.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather used to tell old stories to the children.

sentences.arabic: أَصْغَى الأَطْفَالُ بِعُيُونٍ وَاسِعَةٍ وَقُلُوبٍ مُتَحَمِّسَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su slušala velikih očiju i uzbuđenih srca.
sentences.translationEn: The children listened with wide eyes and excited hearts.

sentences.translation: Priče su ih učile lijepim vrijednostima.
sentences.translationEn: The stories taught them beautiful values.
